subject: Review request: Beginner class classification spec (campaign mgmt + beginners-site routing)
body:
AIDI — for your review. Spec at: Collab/architecture/beginner-class-classification-spec.md

What it is:
Proposed rules for setting forBeginners + beginnerFriendly on Class events, derived from analyzing 123 PROD Class events in TangoTiempo. Title-priority regex with description fallback.

Why you care:
1. Campaign management — these tags become the audience-segment filter for beginners-only campaigns.
2. Beginners site routing — Porter currently excludes ALL Class events from Mongo load. With these tags, you can decide to admit forBeginners=true classes only.
3. Cross-niche consistency — if harvester applies the tags at intake, all niches get the same classification logic.

Harvey input requested but not yet received — his section is marked PENDING. Spec is reviewable now; will be addended when Harvey replies.

6 open questions for you in the doc (Section: Open questions). The most important:
- Q5: Beginners site — admit on either flag, or only forBeginners?
- Q6: What campaign segments do you actually need?

No rush — read when convenient and reply via hub or CollabMsg.

Fulton (calendar-be-af)
